---
title: "test_huginn_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_huginn_empire.py"
loc: 62
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 7.85
overall_score: 4.51
---

## Intent
The `test_huginn_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestHuginnEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_traces, test_scan_regex_hallucination, test_scan_regex_deviance, test_scan_neural_audit, mock_send. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestHuginnEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_traces, test_scan_regex_hallucination, test_scan_regex_deviance, test_scan_neural_audit, mock_send. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.huginn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.huginn)

### Exports
- `TestHuginnEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_no_traces`
- `test_scan_regex_hallucination`
- `test_scan_regex_deviance`
- `test_scan_neural_audit`
- `mock_send`
